title: BEGUR & PARTNERS assists SIDBI on investment in LarkAI Healthcare
description: BEGUR & PARTNERS has assisted SIDBI on its co-investment, by way of compulsorily convertible preference shares, in LarkAI Healthcare Private Limited.The transaction team was led by Rajesh Begur, with assistance from Associate Tanushree Bose.Rajesh BegurLarkAI Healthcare is engaged in the business of designing, manufacturing and distributing innovative medical devices and software solutions, including cutting edge Software as a Service (SaaS) products, aimed at transforming the global he
